narrative: USD weakens as Iran foreign minister announces Strait of Hormuz is open — risk appetite improves; EUR/USD firms at 1.1837, GBP/USD extends gains to 1.3574. USD/JPY pressured to 158.2 on JPY safe-haven bid absence, despite VIX at 17.8. Gold higher +1.67% on inflation hedge demand amid equity gains +0.93%.
